'''''Antares Six''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]].

==History==
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], ''Antares Six'' was part of the [[Rebel Command Fleet]]. As a sign of good faith, it was placed under the command of [[Sullustan Home Guard/Legends|Sullustan Home Guard]] officer [[Syub Snunb]], who led it at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He retained command of it for at least the next six years, and gave it a reputation of being one of the tightest-led ships in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|NRDF]].

After [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and other [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] aboard the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']] crash-landed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], ''Antares Six'' was sent along with ''[[Rebel Star]]'' and [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] to rescue them. ''Antares Six'' managed to successfully navigate the heavy space debris in Coruscant's orbit, though ''Rebel Star'' and its crew were destroyed. ''Antares'' was ordered by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to dock in orbit, and did so. Shortly afterward, a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] wormhole opened up in space, caused by the arrival of an [[Lictor-class dungeon ship|Imperial dungeon ship]]. This wormhole created a massive energy storm, the epicenter of which was very close to ''Antares Six''. However, the frigate survived and fought at the [[Battle of Calamari]], where it was destroyed by an Imperial [[World Devastator]].
